subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter dated 18 September 1902 hath been received... As to what Paul hath said concerning man having two bodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مکتوب مورخ ۱۸ سبتمبر ۱۹۰۲ میلادی واصل گردید ... این که بولس گفته است که انسان را دو بدن است
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @the human soul, @compassion; kindness
